meta.title: ILOILO PROVINCE
meta.subtitle: Iloilo, Western Visayas
meta.description: Iloilo Province surrounds the vibrant Iloilo City and spans across the eastern side of Panay Island, encompassing scenic coastal towns, heritage churches, lush rice fields, and the pristine Gigantes Island Group. Known as the 'Heart of the Philippines,' it offers a perfect blend of history, nature, and Ilonggo culture.

attractions.name: Gigantes Norte Island
attractions.description: A remote island paradise with pristine beaches, sea caves, and towering limestone cliffs.

attractions.name: Cabugao Gamay Island
attractions.description: A tiny postcard-perfect islet with a coconut tree at the center — iconic Gigantes photo spot.

attractions.name: Fort San Pedro Heritage
attractions.description: A historic Spanish fort in Iloilo dating to the 17th century with panoramic harbor views.

attractions.name: Jaro Basilica
attractions.description: A stunning 17th-century cathedral and the only basilica in Asia with an outside belfry.

attractions.name: Miagao Church
attractions.description: UNESCO World Heritage baroque church carved with coconut and papaya motifs.

attractions.name: Tangke Saltwater Lagoon
attractions.description: A stunning saltwater lagoon hidden inside a limestone karst cave at Gigantes Islands.

attractions.name: Sicogon Island
attractions.description: An emerging eco-resort island with powdery white sand and pristine coral reefs.

attractions.name: Garin Farm Pilgrimage
attractions.description: A unique pilgrimage site combining a hilltop church with a working farm and waterpark.

attractions.name: Gigantes Sur Lighthouse
attractions.description: A classic white lighthouse at the tip of Gigantes Sur with sweeping sea views.

activities.name: Gigantes Island Hopping
activities.description: The ultimate Iloilo adventure — hopping between the 21 Gigantes Islands by bangka.

activities.name: Gigantes Cave Snorkeling
activities.description: Snorkel through dramatic sea caves with turquoise waters at the Gigantes archipelago.

activities.name: Iloilo Heritage Church Tour
activities.description: Guided tour of Iloilo's UNESCO and ancestral churches across the province.

activities.name: Surfing San Joaquin
activities.description: Ride the consistent swells of San Joaquin's surf breaks along Iloilo's coast.

activities.name: Paraw Sailing
activities.description: Sail across the Visayan Sea on a traditional double outrigger paraw sailboat.

activities.name: Mangrove Eco Tour
activities.description: Glide through mangrove tunnels teeming with fireflies on a night eco-tour.

activities.name: Scuba Diving Iloilo
activities.description: Explore rich coral gardens and diverse marine life off the coast of Iloilo Province.

activities.name: Tinuaan Festival
activities.description: Participate in this unique cultural festival celebrating the woven textile heritage of Iloilo.

activities.name: Rice Field Walking Tour
activities.description: Walk through endless verdant rice paddies and visit farming families in provincial Iloilo.

food.name: La Paz Batchoy
food.description: The original noodle soup from La Paz, Iloilo — thick egg noodles in rich pork broth with chicharron.

food.name: Pancit Molo
food.description: A unique dumpling soup from Molo district — pork-filled wonton in a clear chicken broth.

food.name: Gigantes Scallops
food.description: Freshly baked or grilled scallops straight from the Gigantes Island harvest — incredibly fresh.

food.name: Bulad (Dried Fish)
food.description: Sun-dried fish and seafood, a staple of Iloilo coastal life, best paired with hot garlic rice.

food.name: Dinuguan
food.description: A savory pork blood stew with chili and vinegar — a bold and comforting Filipino classic.

food.name: Ilonggo Lechon
food.description: Whole roasted pig stuffed with lemongrass and herbs, with crackling golden skin.

food.name: Kadios Manok Soup
food.description: Chicken and pigeon pea soup with batuan fruit, a distinctly Ilonggo sour broth.

food.name: Biscocho
food.description: Twice-baked bread slathered in butter and sugar, Iloilo's most famous pasalubong.

food.name: Iloilo Seafood Market
food.description: Buy fresh catch from fishermen at the Iloilo wharf and have it grilled on-site.

events.name: Dinagyang Festival
events.description: January — Iloilo's world-renowned street festival with tribal warriors in vivid costumes.

events.name: Paraw Regatta Festival
events.description: February — traditional sailboat races from Iloilo City to Guimaras and back.

events.name: Kasadyahan Festival
events.description: January — provincial cultural festival showcasing dances and traditions of Iloilo towns.

events.name: Batchoy Food Festival
events.description: October — La Paz celebrates its famous noodle dish with cooking competitions and free tastings.

events.name: Gigantes Islands Fiesta
events.description: June — island fiesta with traditional boat races, beach games, and seafood feasts.

events.name: Iloilo Fashion & Design Council Show
events.description: Annual fashion show featuring hablon-inspired designs by Ilonggo designers.

events.name: Miagao Church Fiesta
events.description: May 3 — grand fiesta of Miagao's UNESCO church with religious processions and cultural events.

events.name: Ilonggo Food Festival
events.description: August — celebrating Iloilo's culinary heritage with street food stalls and cooking demonstrations.

events.name: Jaro Heritage Walk
events.description: March — guided heritage walk through Jaro district's ancestral houses, churches, and museums.

accommodations.name: Gigantes Island Inn
accommodations.description: Simple island guesthouse on Gigantes Norte, the best base for island hopping.

accommodations.name: Sicogon Island Resort
accommodations.description: Pristine eco-resort on Sicogon Island with beachfront villas and marine activities.

accommodations.name: Hotel Del Rio Iloilo
accommodations.description: Charming riverside hotel in Iloilo City with pool and heritage restaurant.

accommodations.name: Jaro Heritage Hotel
accommodations.description: A restored Spanish colonial mansion converted into a boutique hotel in Jaro.

accommodations.name: Miagao Beach Resort
accommodations.description: Beachside resort near the Miagao UNESCO church with comfortable rooms and seafood dining.

accommodations.name: Villa Iloilo
accommodations.description: Spanish colonial villa with private gardens, a pool, and curated Ilonggo cuisine.

accommodations.name: Molo Mansion Inn
accommodations.description: Heritage mansion in Molo district offering immersive historical accommodation.

accommodations.name: Gigantes Beach Camping
accommodations.description: Tent camping on the beaches of Gigantes Norte with stargazing and bonfires.

accommodations.name: Harbor Hotel Iloilo
accommodations.description: Modern harbor-view hotel with rooftop bar and easy access to Iloilo's attractions.
